# ANALYSIS: SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK Stage-1 OOS walk-forward

**Filed:** 2026-06-18
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** analysis
**Status:** DRAFT

## Hypothesis

We test the base SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK entry (vol_mult=1.3, body_min_cents=0.05, min_stars=2) to see if it passes OOS walk-forward with WF_ratio >= 0.50, establishing whether the core SNIPER logic has predictive power before adding VIX or other filters.

## Mechanism

Entry: when price breaks a named level with volume > vol_mult * 20-bar average volume and body size > body_min_cents, requiring min_stars confluence. Exit: premium stop -8% and TP1 +30% per playbook.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper ~= 14% headline
2. **Sample bias:** 16-month sample (approx Jan 2025 - Apr 2026) chronological split 70/30; selection based on top keeper from sniper_stage1 keepers.jsonl; overfit risk mitigated by OOS walk-forward.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (to be computed)
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (to be computed on top 3 J days)
5. **Failure modes:** worst day loss, max drawdown, blow-up if volatility regime shifts.
6. **Concentration:** TBD after backtest.

## Pre-merge gate

OOS walk-forward WF_ratio >= 0.50, gym validators pass, real-fills on top 3 J days within ±20% of BS sim.

## Confidence

2 / 10 -- no data yet; requires Stage-1 backtest.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Does not conflict with existing candidates; provides baseline SNIPER performance for potential future SNIPER-based candidates.
